Bus Timings

M4 Bus Schedule Mazyad Mall to Razim Street

November 12, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus Route M4 in Abu Dhabi provides a vital connection between Mazyad Mall and Razim Street. This route is designed to serve residents and workers in various neighborhoods, industrial areas, and commercial zones, ensuring efficient and reliable transportation across key locations.

Route Name M4
Route Description Mazyad Mall-Razim Street
Total Distance 22 km
Total Journey Time 45 minutes
Operational Hours 05:57 to 00:37 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 2
Official Website admobility. gov. ae (Abu Dhabi Mobility)

Download PDF Bus M4

Bus M4 Route in Abu Dhabi

Bus Timings

The M4 bus operates from early morning until late night, ensuring that passengers can travel at convenient times throughout the day. The schedule from Mazyad Mall and Razim Street is as follows:

From Mazyad Mall From Razim Street
05:57 07:33
06:27 08:03
07:00 08:36
07:30 09:06
08:01 09:37
08:31 10:07
08:59 10:35
09:57 11:33
10:56 12:32
11:56 13:32
12:56 14:32
14:00 15:36
14:58 16:34
15:55 17:31
16:25 18:01
16:52 18:28
17:22 18:58
17:58 19:34
18:28 20:04
19:01 20:37
20:00 21:36
21:01 22:37
22:01 23:37
23:01 00:37

Bus M4 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can refer to the official AD Mobility website or simply follow this link to view the M4 Bus Timings.

Also See: Route and Stops of Abu Dhabi Bus M3: Full Details

Bus Ticket Price

Abu Dhabi introduced new bus fares in February 2024. The standard fare is now AED 2 plus AED 0.05 per kilometer, with weekly and monthly passes available. For the most accurate fare on the M4 bus, use a mandatory Hafilat Smart Card. Check the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport for the latest updates on fares and passes.

Bus Booking

Tickets for the M4 bus route can be purchased directly at bus stations or through various authorized ticket vendors. Online booking allows passengers to secure their seats in advance and avoid any last-minute hassles, ensuring a smooth and efficient travel experience.

Check out our guide on traveling from Abu Dhabi to Dammam by road, including bus schedules and fare reviews.

Bus Route

The M4 bus route begins at Mazyad Mall and concludes at Razim Street, making several significant stops along the way. The detailed route is as follows:

  1. Mazyad Mall

  2. Mazyad Mall

  3. Capital Mall

  4. Emirates Islamic Bank

  5. Street 13

  6. United Bank

  7. Street 9

  8. Street 8

  9. ADCO

  10. Mussafah Port

  11. Mussafah Port

  12. Al Jaber Group

  13. Street 8

  14. Street 12

  15. ADNOC Vehicle Inspection Centre

  16. Ware House

  17. National Petroleum Corporation

  18. Gulf Steel Industries

  19. Street 16

  20. ADNOC

  21. Al Muahadah Street

  1. Street 16

  2. Friday Market

  3. Medical Industries

  4. ICAD Residential City Gate XX

  5. ICAD Residential City Gate 2

  6. Street 11

  7. Street 13

  8. Civil Defence

  9. Al Jimi Worker Village

  10. Street 15

  11. Drivers and Vehicles Licensing Department

  12. Street 18

  13. Dalma Mall Main Entrance

  14. Dalma Mall West

  15. Al Saqlawi Street

  16. Al Basrah Street

  17. Emirates Identity Authority Factory

  18. Western Region Development Council

  19. First Abu Dhabi Bank

  20. Al Rab’i Street

  21. Al Yad’ah Street

  22. Al Qaltah Street

  23. Razim Street

Read More: Complete Guide to Bus 83 Route and Stops in Dubai

Touris Destination Along the Way

There are a few noteworthy places along the M4 bus route in Abu Dhabi that could be of interest to tourists and visitors:

  1. Mazyad Mall: As the starting point of the M4 bus route, Mazyad Mall is a popular shopping destination in Abu Dhabi. It offers a variety of retail outlets, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

  2. Capital Mall: Another major shopping destination, Capital Mall features a range of shops, cafes, and restaurants. It’s a great spot for a shopping spree or a relaxing meal.

  3. Dalma Mall: This large mall is a significant attraction along the M4 route. Dalma Mall boasts an extensive array of shops, dining establishments, and entertainment options, including a cinema and family entertainment centers.

4.

5.

Journey Experience

The M4 bus journey from Mazyad Mall to Razim Street is a long but scenic route through Abu Dhabi, offering passengers a glimpse of both historical and modern landmarks.

Though the journey is lengthy, it allows passengers to experience the city’s diverse character, blending modern architecture with cultural history, making it an engaging trip for anyone exploring Abu Dhabi.

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily reach Razim Street, the furthest point on the M4 bus route starting from Mazyad Mall, with a price range of AED 26-30. This convenient option allows for a seamless and comfortable journey, ensuring you arrive at your destination hassle-free. Enjoy the flexibility and ease of travel that Careem provides, making your trip more enjoyable and efficient.

With this comprehensive guide, navigating the M4 bus route between Mazyad Mall and Razim Street becomes straightforward, providing passengers with essential information for a hassle-free journey. Whether you are a daily commuter or an occasional traveler, the M4 bus route ensures convenient and reliable transportation across key locations in Abu Dhabi. Plan your trip with confidence and enjoy the seamless connectivity offered by the M4 service.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: November 12, 2025.
